suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in mors-worker skill that fix features (small, targeted patches with automated regression tests) may satisfy verification through automated test evidence alone, without requiring a separate manual CLI sanity check, especially when the fix is purely internal (e.g., artifact registration order) and not directly user-visible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker session 05b1530e for core-fix-init-atomic-cleanup-registration ran only automated checks but marked followedProcedure=true. The skill's step 6 requires manual CLI checks, but for an internal-only fix to artifact registration order this is arguably unnecessary overhead.
